title: Elena Voss Photographer Portfolio
seoTitle: Elena Voss Photographer Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A premium photographer portfolio with image-led storytelling, elegant typography, and a cleaner gallery-first layout.
summary: A premium photographer portfolio with image-led storytelling, elegant typography, and a cleaner gallery-first layout.
description: This template is designed for photographers and visual artists who need a high-trust personal site with large imagery, selective editorial copy, and portfolio-first presentation.
audience: photographers, visual artists, and editorial creators
prompt: Design a premium photographer portfolio with clean gallery rhythm, strong image hierarchy, elegant typography, and minimal supporting copy.
layoutNotes: The page relies on imagery and whitespace more than interface chrome.
Use this template when the work itself needs to be the dominant visual anchor.
responsiveNotes: Gallery blocks stack into mobile-friendly image rails with preserved rhythm.
Captions and metadata remain secondary so imagery keeps visual priority.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Elena Voss — Photographer</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&display=swap');

  :root {
    --color-bg: #faf9f7;
    --color-bg-dark: #1a1a1a;
    --color-text: #2c2c2c;
    --color-text-light: #8a8a8a;
    --color-text-inv: #f5f5f0;
    --color-accent: #c9a96e;
    --color-accent-dark: #b08d4f;
    --color-border: #e0ddd8;
    --color-overlay: rgba(26,26,26,0.85);
    --font-serif: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif;
    --font-elegant: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
    --ease-smooth: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1);
    --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
    --space-xs: 0.5rem;
    --space-sm: 1rem;
    --space-md: 2rem;
    --space-lg: 4rem;
    --space-xl: 6rem;
    --space-2xl: 10rem;
  }

  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    color: var(--color-text);
    background: var(--color-bg);
    line-height: 1.7;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ─── NAV ─── */
  .nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 1000;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.5rem 3rem;
    transition: background 0.5s var(--ease-smooth), padding 0.4s var(--ease-smooth);
  }
  .nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(250,249,247,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 1rem 3rem;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--color-border);
  }
  .nav__logo {
    font-family: var(--font-serif);
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--color-text-inv);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.4s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled .nav__logo { color: var(--color-text); }
  .nav__links { display: flex; gap: 2.2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav__links a {
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-inv);
    text-decoration: none;
    opacity: 0.8;
    transition: opacity 0.3s, color 0.4s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled .nav__links a { color: var(--color-text); }
  .nav__links a:hover { opacity: 1; }
  .nav__burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .nav__burger span {
    width: 24px; height: 1.5px; background: var(--color-text-inv);
    transition: background 0.4s, transform 0.3s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled .nav__burger span { background: var(--color-text); }

  /* ─── HERO (Ken Burns) ─── */
  .hero {
    position: relative; height: 100vh; min-height: 600px;
    overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: flex-end;
  }
  .hero__bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: url('https://picsum.photos/seed/photoghero/1920/1080') center/cover no-repeat;
    animation: kenBurns 25s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes kenBurns {
    0%   { transform: scale(1) translate(0, 0); }
    100% { transform: scale(1.12) translate(-1.5%, -1%); }
  }
  .hero__overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 100%);
  }
  .hero__content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 0 3rem 5rem;
    max-width: 800px; color: var(--color-text-inv);
  }
  .hero__tagline {
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo) forwards;
  }
  .hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-serif);
    font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.7s var(--ease-out-expo) forwards;
  }
  .hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant);
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.4rem);
    font-weight: 300; font-style: italic;
    opacity: 0.8; max-width: 500px; line-height: 1.6;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.9s var(--ease-out-expo) forwards;
  }
  .hero__scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: 3rem; z-index: 2;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .hero__scroll span {
    font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-inv); opacity: 0.6; writing-mode: vertical-rl;
  }
  .hero__scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 60px; background: var(--color-text-inv); opacity: 0.3;
    animation: scrollPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes scrollPulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 0.3; }
    50% { transform: scaleY(0.5); opacity: 0.6; }
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* ─── SECTION UTILITY ─── */
  .section {
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 3rem;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo), transform 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .section.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .section__label {
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }
  .section__title {
    font-family: var(--font-serif);
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
    font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .section__desc {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant);
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--color-text-light);
    max-width: 520px; line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ─── HORIZONTAL SCROLL GALLERY ─── */
  .gallery-h {
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 0 var(--space-2xl) 3rem;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gallery-h__header { padding-right: 3rem; margin-bottom: var(--space-lg); }
  .gallery-h__track {
    display: flex; gap: 1.5rem;
    overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .gallery-h__track::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .gallery-h__item {
    flex: 0 0 auto; scroll-snap-align: start;
    position: relative; cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .gallery-h__item:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); }
  .gallery-h__item--wide { width: 560px; height: 380px; }
  .gallery-h__item--tall { width: 340px; height: 460px; }
  .gallery-h__item--sq   { width: 380px; height: 380px; }
  .gallery-h__item img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    filter: grayscale(20%);
    transition: filter 0.5s;
  }
  .gallery-h__item:hover img { filter: grayscale(0%); }
  .gallery-h__caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem 1.2rem;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7), transparent);
    color: var(--color-text-inv); font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-style: italic;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: all 0.4s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .gallery-h__item:hover .gallery-h__caption { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  /* ─── FILM STRIP NAV ─── */
  .filmstrip {
    display: flex; gap: 0.35rem; padding: 0.5rem 0; margin-top: var(--space-sm);
    overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .filmstrip::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .filmstrip__frame {
    flex: 0 0 auto; width: 80px; height: 54px; cursor: pointer;
    border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.3s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .filmstrip__frame::before, .filmstrip__frame::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 6px; height: 4px; background: var(--color-text-light); border-radius: 1px;
  }
  .filmstrip__frame::before { top: 2px; }
  .filmstrip__frame::after  { bottom: 2px; }
  .filmstrip__frame img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: grayscale(100%); transition: filter 0.3s; }
  .filmstrip__frame:hover, .filmstrip__frame.active { border-color: var(--color-accent); }
  .filmstrip__frame:hover img, .filmstrip__frame.active img { filter: grayscale(0%); }

  /* ─── BEFORE / AFTER SLIDER ─── */
  .compare {
    background: var(--color-bg-dark); color: var(--color-text-inv);
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 3rem;
  }
  .compare__inner {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center;
  }
  .compare__header { margin-bottom: var(--space-lg); }
  .compare__header .section__label { color: var(--color-accent); }
  .compare__header .section__title { color: var(--color-text-inv); }
  .compare__header .section__desc { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin: 0 auto; }
  .compare__slider-wrap {
    position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto; aspect-ratio: 16/10; overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 4px; cursor: ew-resize; user-select: none;
  }
  .compare__img { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .compare__img--after { clip-path: inset(0 50% 0 0); }
  .compare__divider {
    position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 3px;
    background: var(--color-accent); z-index: 3; transform: translateX(-50%);
  }
  .compare__handle {
    position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%;
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--color-accent); border: 3px solid #fff;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 4;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .compare__handle::before {
    content: '⟺'; font-size: 1rem; color: #fff;
  }
  .compare__labels {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: var(--space-sm);
    max-width: 900px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;
  }
  .compare__label {
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }

  /* ─── ABOUT WITH POLAROID CARDS ─── */
  .about { background: var(--color-bg); }
  .about__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
    gap: var(--space-lg); max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .about__text { padding-top: var(--space-md); }
  .about__text p {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--color-text-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
  }
  .about__polaroids {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem;
  }
  .polaroid {
    background: #fff; padding: 10px 10px 40px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    transform: rotate(var(--rot, 0deg));
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo), box-shadow 0.5s;
  }
  .polaroid:nth-child(1) { --rot: -3deg; }
  .polaroid:nth-child(2) { --rot: 2deg; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .polaroid:nth-child(3) { --rot: 1.5deg; margin-top: -1.5rem; }
  .polaroid:nth-child(4) { --rot: -2deg; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .polaroid:hover {
    transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.03);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  }
  .polaroid img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; filter: sepia(10%); }
  .polaroid__caption {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-style: italic;
    font-size: 0.85rem; text-align: center; color: var(--color-text-light);
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  /* ─── AWARDS ─── */
  .awards {
    background: var(--color-bg-dark); color: var(--color-text-inv);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .awards__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-md); max-width: 1000px; margin: var(--space-lg) auto 0;
  }
  .award {
    padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-sm);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 2px;
    transition: border-color 0.4s, transform 0.4s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .award:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .award__icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: var(--space-xs); }
  .award__year {
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .award__name {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .award__org {
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }

  /* ─── BLOG PREVIEW ─── */
  .blog { background: var(--color-bg); }
  .blog__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-md); max-width: 1100px; margin: var(--space-lg) auto 0;
  }
  .blog-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo), box-shadow 0.5s;
  }
  .blog-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }
  .blog-card__img {
    width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/10; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .blog-card:hover .blog-card__img { transform: scale(1.05); }
  .blog-card__body { padding: 1.5rem; }
  .blog-card__date {
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .blog-card__title {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .blog-card__excerpt {
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--color-text-light); line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .blog-card__link {
    display: inline-block; margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent-dark); text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
    padding-bottom: 2px; transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .blog-card__link:hover { color: var(--color-text); }

  /* ─── CONTACT ─── */
  .contact {
    background: var(--color-bg); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  }
  .contact__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-lg); max-width: 900px; margin: var(--space-lg) auto 0;
  }
  .contact__info h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
  }
  .contact__info p {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--color-text-light); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
  }
  .contact__info a {
    color: var(--color-accent-dark); text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .contact__info a:hover { color: var(--color-text); }
  .contact__form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.2rem; }
  .contact__field {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.4rem;
  }
  .contact__field label {
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-light);
  }
  .contact__field input, .contact__field textarea {
    font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 0; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    background: transparent; color: var(--color-text); outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .contact__field input:focus, .contact__field textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
  }
  .contact__field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }
  .contact__btn {
    align-self: flex-start; font-family: var(--font-sans);
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-text);
    background: transparent; color: var(--color-text); cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.4s, color 0.4s;
  }
  .contact__btn:hover { background: var(--color-text); color: var(--color-bg); }

  /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
  .footer {
    padding: var(--space-lg) 3rem var(--space-md);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  }
  .footer__copy {
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-light);
  }
  .footer__socials { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .footer__socials a {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-light); text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .footer__socials a:hover { color: var(--color-accent-dark); }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─── */
  .lightbox {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 2000;
    background: var(--color-overlay);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease-smooth);
  }
  .lightbox.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }
  .lightbox__img {
    max-width: 85vw; max-height: 85vh; object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: 2px; transform: scale(0.9);
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .lightbox.active .lightbox__img { transform: scale(1); }
  .lightbox__close {
    position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem;
    width: 40px; height: 40px; background: none; border: none;
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .lightbox__close::before, .lightbox__close::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; width: 24px; height: 2px;
    background: #fff; transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .lightbox__close::before { transform: rotate(45deg); }
  .lightbox__close::after  { transform: rotate(-45deg); }
  .lightbox__close:hover::before { transform: rotate(45deg) scale(1.1); }
  .lightbox__close:hover::after  { transform: rotate(-45deg) scale(1.1); }
  .lightbox__nav {
    position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    color: #fff; font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .lightbox__nav:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
  .lightbox__nav--prev { left: 2rem; }
  .lightbox__nav--next { right: 2rem; }
  .lightbox__counter {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }

  /* ─── MOBILE NAV OVERLAY ─── */
  .mobile-nav {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;
    background: var(--color-bg-dark);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 2rem; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease-smooth);
  }
  .mobile-nav.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }
  .mobile-nav a {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--color-text-inv); text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .mobile-nav a:hover { color: var(--color-accent); }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .about__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .awards__grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .blog__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .contact__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }

<!-- ─── LIGHTBOX ─── -->

  <img class="lightbox__img" id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="">
  <button class="lightbox__nav lightbox__nav--next" id="lightboxNext" aria-label="Next">→</button>
  <div class="lightbox__counter" id="lightboxCounter"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  /* ── Nav scroll effect ── */
  const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
  let lastScroll = 0;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
  });

  /* ── Mobile nav ── */
  const burger = document.getElementById('navBurger');
  const mobileNav = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  burger.addEventListener('click', () => {
    mobileNav.classList.toggle('active');
  });
  window.closeMobileNav = function() {
    mobileNav.classList.remove('active');
  };

  /* ── Intersection Observer for sections ── */
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  sections.forEach(s => observer.observe(s));

  /* ── Lightbox ── */
  const lightbox = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const lightboxImg = document.getElementById('lightboxImg');
  const lightboxCounter = document.getElementById('lightboxCounter');
  const galleryItems = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-h__item');
  const lightboxImages = [
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide1/1600/1067.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-tall1/1000/1350.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-sq1/1200/1200.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide2/1600/1067.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-tall2/1000/1350.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-sq2/1200/1200.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide3/1600/1067.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-sq3/1200/1200.jpg'
  ];
  let currentLightbox = 0;

  function openLightbox(index) {
    currentLightbox = index;
    lightboxImg.src = lightboxImages[index];
    lightboxCounter.textContent = `${index + 1} / ${lightboxImages.length}`;
    lightbox.classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  function navLightbox(dir) {
    currentLightbox = (currentLightbox + dir + lightboxImages.length) % lightboxImages.length;
    lightboxImg.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => {
      lightboxImg.src = lightboxImages[currentLightbox];
      lightboxCounter.textContent = `${currentLightbox + 1} / ${lightboxImages.length}`;
      lightboxImg.style.opacity = '1';
    }, 200);
  }

  galleryItems.forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', () => openLightbox(parseInt(item.dataset.index)));
  });

  document.getElementById('lightboxClose').addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  document.getElementById('lightboxPrev').addEventListener('click', () => navLightbox(-1));
  document.getElementById('lightboxNext').addEventListener('click', () => navLightbox(1));
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (!lightbox.classList.contains('active')) return;
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') navLightbox(-1);
    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') navLightbox(1);
  });

  /* Lightbox image transition */
  lightboxImg.style.transition = 'opacity 0.2s ease';

  /* ── Filmstrip interaction ── */
  const filmstripFrames = document.querySelectorAll('.filmstrip__frame');
  const galleryTrack = document.getElementById('galleryTrack');

  filmstripFrames.forEach(frame => {
    frame.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const idx = parseInt(frame.dataset.index);
      filmstripFrames.forEach(f => f.classList.remove('active'));
      frame.classList.add('active');
      const targetItem = galleryTrack.children[idx];
      if (targetItem) {
        targetItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'start', block: 'nearest' });
      }
    });
  });

  /* ── Before/After Slider ── */
  const sliderWrap = document.getElementById('compareSlider');
  const afterImg = sliderWrap.querySelector('.compare__img--after');
  const divider = document.getElementById('compareDivider');
  const handle = document.getElementById('compareHandle');
  let isDragging = false;

  function updateSlider(x) {
    const rect = sliderWrap.getBoundingClientRect();
    let pct = ((x - rect.left) / rect.width) * 100;
    pct = Math.max(2, Math.min(98, pct));
    afterImg.style.clipPath = `inset(0 ${100 - pct}% 0 0)`;
    divider.style.left = pct + '%';
    handle.style.left = pct + '%';
  }

  sliderWrap.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => { isDragging = true; updateSlider(e.clientX); });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { if (isDragging) updateSlider(e.clientX); });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { isDragging = false; });
  sliderWrap.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { isDragging = true; updateSlider(e.touches[0].clientX); }, { passive: true });
  document.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => { if (isDragging) updateSlider(e.touches[0].clientX); }, { passive: true });
  document.addEventListener('touchend', () => { isDragging = false; });

  /* ── Contact form handler ── */
  window.handleSubmit = function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = e.target.querySelector('.contact__btn');
    btn.textContent = 'Message Sent ✓';
    btn.style.background = 'var(--color-accent)';
    btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-accent)';
    btn.style.color = '#fff';
    setTimeout(() => {
      btn.textContent = 'Send Message';
      btn.style.background = '';
      btn.style.borderColor = '';
      btn.style.color = '';
      e.target.reset();
    }, 3000);
  };

  /* ── Smooth anchor offset ── */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
    a.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const target = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">

<title>Elena Voss — Photographer</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,500&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&display=swap');

  :root {
    --color-bg: #faf9f7;

    --color-text: #2c2c2c;
    --color-text-light: #8a8a8a;
    --color-text-inv: #f5f5f0;

  }

  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; font-size: 16px; }

    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    color: var(--color-text);
    background: var(--color-bg);
    line-height: 1.7;

  }

  /* ─── NAV ─── */
  .nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 1000;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;

  }
  .nav.scrolled {
    background: rgba(250,249,247,0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    padding: 1rem 3rem;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 0 var(--color-border);
  }
  .nav__logo {
    font-family: var(--font-serif);
    font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
    color: var(--color-text-inv);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.4s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled .nav__logo { color: var(--color-text); }
  .nav__links { display: flex; gap: 2.2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav__links a {
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-inv);
    text-decoration: none;
    opacity: 0.8;
    transition: opacity 0.3s, color 0.4s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled .nav__links a { color: var(--color-text); }
  .nav__links a:hover { opacity: 1; }
  .nav__burger { display: none; cursor: pointer; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .nav__burger span {
    width: 24px; height: 1.5px; background: var(--color-text-inv);
    transition: background 0.4s, transform 0.3s;
  }
  .nav.scrolled .nav__burger span { background: var(--color-text); }

  /* ─── HERO (Ken Burns) ─── */
  .hero {
    position: relative; height: 100vh; min-height: 600px;
    overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: flex-end;
  }
  .hero__bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: url('https://picsum.photos/seed/photoghero/1920/1080') center/cover no-repeat;
    animation: kenBurns 25s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  @keyframes kenBurns {
    0%   { transform: scale(1) translate(0, 0); }
    100% { transform: scale(1.12) translate(-1.5%, -1%); }
  }
  .hero__overlay {
    position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 100%);
  }
  .hero__content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 0 3rem 5rem;
    max-width: 800px; color: var(--color-text-inv);
  }
  .hero__tagline {
    font-family: var(--font-sans);
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400;
    letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo) forwards;
  }
  .hero__title {
    font-family: var(--font-serif);
    font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem);
    font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.1;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.7s var(--ease-out-expo) forwards;
  }
  .hero__subtitle {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant);
    font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2vw, 1.4rem);
    font-weight: 300; font-style: italic;
    opacity: 0.8; max-width: 500px; line-height: 1.6;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp 1s 0.9s var(--ease-out-expo) forwards;
  }
  .hero__scroll {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; right: 3rem; z-index: 2;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
  }
  .hero__scroll span {
    font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-inv); opacity: 0.6; writing-mode: vertical-rl;
  }
  .hero__scroll-line {
    width: 1px; height: 60px; background: var(--color-text-inv); opacity: 0.3;
    animation: scrollPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes scrollPulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 0.3; }
    50% { transform: scaleY(0.5); opacity: 0.6; }
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  /* ─── SECTION UTILITY ─── */
  .section {
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 3rem;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px);
    transition: opacity 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo), transform 0.8s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .section.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  .section__label {
    font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.25em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
  }
  .section__title {
    font-family: var(--font-serif);
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
    font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .section__desc {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant);
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 300; color: var(--color-text-light);
    max-width: 520px; line-height: 1.7;
  }

  /* ─── HORIZONTAL SCROLL GALLERY ─── */
  .gallery-h {
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 0 var(--space-2xl) 3rem;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .gallery-h__header { padding-right: 3rem; margin-bottom: var(--space-lg); }
  .gallery-h__track {
    display: flex; gap: 1.5rem;
    overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
    scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .gallery-h__track::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .gallery-h__item {
    flex: 0 0 auto; scroll-snap-align: start;
    position: relative; cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .gallery-h__item:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); }
  .gallery-h__item--wide { width: 560px; height: 380px; }
  .gallery-h__item--tall { width: 340px; height: 460px; }
  .gallery-h__item--sq   { width: 380px; height: 380px; }
  .gallery-h__item img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    filter: grayscale(20%);
    transition: filter 0.5s;
  }
  .gallery-h__item:hover img { filter: grayscale(0%); }
  .gallery-h__caption {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    padding: 2rem 1.5rem 1.2rem;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7), transparent);
    color: var(--color-text-inv); font-size: 0.85rem;
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-style: italic;
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px);
    transition: all 0.4s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .gallery-h__item:hover .gallery-h__caption { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  /* ─── FILM STRIP NAV ─── */
  .filmstrip {
    display: flex; gap: 0.35rem; padding: 0.5rem 0; margin-top: var(--space-sm);
    overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none;
  }
  .filmstrip::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .filmstrip__frame {
    flex: 0 0 auto; width: 80px; height: 54px; cursor: pointer;
    border: 2px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.3s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .filmstrip__frame::before, .filmstrip__frame::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 6px; height: 4px; background: var(--color-text-light); border-radius: 1px;
  }
  .filmstrip__frame::before { top: 2px; }
  .filmstrip__frame::after  { bottom: 2px; }
  .filmstrip__frame img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: grayscale(100%); transition: filter 0.3s; }
  .filmstrip__frame:hover, .filmstrip__frame.active { border-color: var(--color-accent); }
  .filmstrip__frame:hover img, .filmstrip__frame.active img { filter: grayscale(0%); }

  /* ─── BEFORE / AFTER SLIDER ─── */
  .compare {
    background: var(--color-bg-dark); color: var(--color-text-inv);
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 3rem;
  }
  .compare__inner {
    max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; text-align: center;
  }
  .compare__header { margin-bottom: var(--space-lg); }
  .compare__header .section__label { color: var(--color-accent); }
  .compare__header .section__title { color: var(--color-text-inv); }
  .compare__header .section__desc { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); margin: 0 auto; }
  .compare__slider-wrap {
    position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 900px;
    margin: 0 auto; aspect-ratio: 16/10; overflow: hidden;
    border-radius: 4px; cursor: ew-resize; user-select: none;
  }
  .compare__img { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .compare__img--after { clip-path: inset(0 50% 0 0); }
  .compare__divider {
    position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 3px;
    background: var(--color-accent); z-index: 3; transform: translateX(-50%);
  }
  .compare__handle {
    position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%;
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--color-accent); border: 3px solid #fff;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 4;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  .compare__handle::before {
    content: '⟺'; font-size: 1rem; color: #fff;
  }
  .compare__labels {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: var(--space-sm);
    max-width: 900px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;
  }
  .compare__label {
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }

  /* ─── ABOUT WITH POLAROID CARDS ─── */
  .about { background: var(--color-bg); }
  .about__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.4fr;
    gap: var(--space-lg); max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto;
    align-items: start;
  }
  .about__text { padding-top: var(--space-md); }
  .about__text p {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--color-text-light);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
  }
  .about__polaroids {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem;
  }
  .polaroid {
    background: #fff; padding: 10px 10px 40px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
    transform: rotate(var(--rot, 0deg));
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo), box-shadow 0.5s;
  }
  .polaroid:nth-child(1) { --rot: -3deg; }
  .polaroid:nth-child(2) { --rot: 2deg; margin-top: 2rem; }
  .polaroid:nth-child(3) { --rot: 1.5deg; margin-top: -1.5rem; }
  .polaroid:nth-child(4) { --rot: -2deg; margin-top: 1rem; }
  .polaroid:hover {
    transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1.03);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  }
  .polaroid img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; filter: sepia(10%); }
  .polaroid__caption {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-style: italic;
    font-size: 0.85rem; text-align: center; color: var(--color-text-light);
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  /* ─── AWARDS ─── */
  .awards {
    background: var(--color-bg-dark); color: var(--color-text-inv);
    text-align: center;
  }
  .awards__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-md); max-width: 1000px; margin: var(--space-lg) auto 0;
  }
  .award {
    padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-sm);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    border-radius: 2px;
    transition: border-color 0.4s, transform 0.4s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .award:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent); transform: translateY(-4px); }
  .award__icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: var(--space-xs); }
  .award__year {
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .award__name {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .award__org {
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }

  /* ─── BLOG PREVIEW ─── */
  .blog { background: var(--color-bg); }
  .blog__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-md); max-width: 1100px; margin: var(--space-lg) auto 0;
  }
  .blog-card {
    background: #fff; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo), box-shadow 0.5s;
  }
  .blog-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }
  .blog-card__img {
    width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16/10; object-fit: cover;
    transition: transform 0.6s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .blog-card:hover .blog-card__img { transform: scale(1.05); }
  .blog-card__body { padding: 1.5rem; }
  .blog-card__date {
    font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent); margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .blog-card__title {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .blog-card__excerpt {
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--color-text-light); line-height: 1.6;
  }
  .blog-card__link {
    display: inline-block; margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.72rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-accent-dark); text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
    padding-bottom: 2px; transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .blog-card__link:hover { color: var(--color-text); }

  /* ─── CONTACT ─── */
  .contact {
    background: var(--color-bg); border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  }
  .contact__grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: var(--space-lg); max-width: 900px; margin: var(--space-lg) auto 0;
  }
  .contact__info h3 {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 1.4rem;
    font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
  }
  .contact__info p {
    font-family: var(--font-elegant); font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--color-text-light); line-height: 1.8; margin-bottom: var(--space-sm);
  }
  .contact__info a {
    color: var(--color-accent-dark); text-decoration: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-accent);
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .contact__info a:hover { color: var(--color-text); }
  .contact__form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.2rem; }
  .contact__field {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.4rem;
  }
  .contact__field label {
    font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-light);
  }
  .contact__field input, .contact__field textarea {
    font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 0.9rem;
    padding: 0.75rem 0; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
    background: transparent; color: var(--color-text); outline: none;
    transition: border-color 0.3s;
  }
  .contact__field input:focus, .contact__field textarea:focus {
    border-color: var(--color-accent);
  }
  .contact__field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 100px; }
  .contact__btn {
    align-self: flex-start; font-family: var(--font-sans);
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-text);
    background: transparent; color: var(--color-text); cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.4s, color 0.4s;
  }
  .contact__btn:hover { background: var(--color-text); color: var(--color-bg); }

  /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
  .footer {
    padding: var(--space-lg) 3rem var(--space-md);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  }
  .footer__copy {
    font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-light);
  }
  .footer__socials { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .footer__socials a {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--color-text-light); text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .footer__socials a:hover { color: var(--color-accent-dark); }

  /* ─── LIGHTBOX ─── */
  .lightbox {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 2000;
    background: var(--color-overlay);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease-smooth);
  }
  .lightbox.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }
  .lightbox__img {
    max-width: 85vw; max-height: 85vh; object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: 2px; transform: scale(0.9);
    transition: transform 0.5s var(--ease-out-expo);
  }
  .lightbox.active .lightbox__img { transform: scale(1); }
  .lightbox__close {
    position: absolute; top: 2rem; right: 2rem;
    width: 40px; height: 40px; background: none; border: none;
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }
  .lightbox__close::before, .lightbox__close::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; width: 24px; height: 2px;
    background: #fff; transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .lightbox__close::before { transform: rotate(45deg); }
  .lightbox__close::after  { transform: rotate(-45deg); }
  .lightbox__close:hover::before { transform: rotate(45deg) scale(1.1); }
  .lightbox__close:hover::after  { transform: rotate(-45deg) scale(1.1); }
  .lightbox__nav {
    position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    color: #fff; font-size: 1.2rem; cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: background 0.3s;
  }
  .lightbox__nav:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
  .lightbox__nav--prev { left: 2rem; }
  .lightbox__nav--next { right: 2rem; }
  .lightbox__counter {
    position: absolute; bottom: 2rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }

  /* ─── MOBILE NAV OVERLAY ─── */
  .mobile-nav {
    position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 999;
    background: var(--color-bg-dark);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    gap: 2rem; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 0.4s var(--ease-smooth);
  }
  .mobile-nav.active { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; }
  .mobile-nav a {
    font-family: var(--font-serif); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--color-text-inv); text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .mobile-nav a:hover { color: var(--color-accent); }

  /* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .about__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .awards__grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .blog__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .contact__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .nav__links { display: none; }
    .nav__burger { display: flex; }
    .section { padding: var(--space-xl) 1.5rem; }
    .gallery-h { padding: var(--space-xl) 0 var(--space-xl) 1.5rem; }
    .gallery-h__item--wide { width: 320px; height: 220px; }
    .gallery-h__item--tall { width: 240px; height: 320px; }
    .gallery-h__item--sq   { width: 260px; height: 260px; }
    .about__polaroids { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; }
    .blog__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; max-width: 500px; }
    .awards__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .footer { flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; text-align: center; }
    .hero__content { padding: 0 1.5rem 4rem; }
    .compare { padding: var(--space-xl) 1.5rem; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 480px) {
    .about__polaroids { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .polaroid:nth-child(2), .polaroid:nth-child(4) { margin-top: 0; }
    .awards__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ─── NAVIGATION ─── -->
<nav class="nav" id="mainNav">
  <a href="#" class="nav__logo">Elena Voss</a>
  <ul class="nav__links">
    <li><a href="#gallery">Portfolio</a></li>
    <li><a href="#compare">Process</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#awards">Recognition</a></li>
    <li><a href="#blog">Journal</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <div class="nav__burger" id="navBurger" aria-label="Menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ─── MOBILE NAV ─── -->
<div class="mobile-nav" id="mobileNav">
  <a href="#gallery" onclick="closeMobileNav()">Portfolio</a>
  <a href="#compare" onclick="closeMobileNav()">Process</a>
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMobileNav()">About</a>
  <a href="#awards" onclick="closeMobileNav()">Recognition</a>
  <a href="#blog" onclick="closeMobileNav()">Journal</a>
  <a href="#contact" onclick="closeMobileNav()">Contact</a>
</div>

<!-- ─── HERO ─── -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero__bg"></div>
  <div class="hero__overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero__content">
    <p class="hero__tagline">Award-Winning Photographer</p>
    <h1 class="hero__title">Capturing Light,<br>Telling Stories</h1>
    <p class="hero__subtitle">Through the lens, every fleeting moment becomes an eternal narrative — raw, poetic, and unmistakably human.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="hero__scroll">
    <span>Scroll</span>
    <div class="hero__scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ─── HORIZONTAL SCROLL GALLERY ─── -->
<section class="gallery-h section" id="gallery">
  <div class="gallery-h__header">
    <p class="section__label">Selected Works</p>
    <h2 class="section__title">Portfolio</h2>
    <p class="section__desc">A curated collection of moments frozen in time — each frame a dialogue between shadow and light.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="gallery-h__track" id="galleryTrack">
    <div class="gallery-h__item gallery-h__item--wide" data-index="0">
      <img src="https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide1/1120/760.jpg" alt="Golden Hour Landscape" loading="lazy">

<!-- ─── LIGHTBOX ─── -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
  <button class="lightbox__close" id="lightboxClose" aria-label="Close"></button>
  <button class="lightbox__nav lightbox__nav--prev" id="lightboxPrev" aria-label="Previous">←</button>
  <img class="lightbox__img" id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="">
  <button class="lightbox__nav lightbox__nav--next" id="lightboxNext" aria-label="Next">→</button>
  <div class="lightbox__counter" id="lightboxCounter"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  /* ── Nav scroll effect ── */
  const nav = document.getElementById('mainNav');
  let lastScroll = 0;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
  });

  /* ── Mobile nav ── */
  const burger = document.getElementById('navBurger');
  const mobileNav = document.getElementById('mobileNav');
  burger.addEventListener('click', () => {
    mobileNav.classList.toggle('active');
  });
  window.closeMobileNav = function() {
    mobileNav.classList.remove('active');
  };

  /* ── Intersection Observer for sections ── */
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -40px 0px' });
  sections.forEach(s => observer.observe(s));

  /* ── Lightbox ── */
  const lightbox = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const lightboxImg = document.getElementById('lightboxImg');
  const lightboxCounter = document.getElementById('lightboxCounter');
  const galleryItems = document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-h__item');
  const lightboxImages = [
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide1/1600/1067.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-tall1/1000/1350.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-sq1/1200/1200.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide2/1600/1067.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-tall2/1000/1350.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-sq2/1200/1200.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-wide3/1600/1067.jpg',
    'https://picsum.photos/seed/pf-sq3/1200/1200.jpg'
  ];
  let currentLightbox = 0;

  function openLightbox(index) {
    currentLightbox = index;
    lightboxImg.src = lightboxImages[index];
    lightboxCounter.textContent = `${index + 1} / ${lightboxImages.length}`;
    lightbox.classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }

  function closeLightbox() {
    lightbox.classList.remove('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  function navLightbox(dir) {
    currentLightbox = (currentLightbox + dir + lightboxImages.length) % lightboxImages.length;
    lightboxImg.style.opacity = '0';
    setTimeout(() => {
      lightboxImg.src = lightboxImages[currentLightbox];
      lightboxCounter.textContent = `${currentLightbox + 1} / ${lightboxImages.length}`;
      lightboxImg.style.opacity = '1';
    }, 200);
  }

  galleryItems.forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', () => openLightbox(parseInt(item.dataset.index)));
  });

  document.getElementById('lightboxClose').addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
  document.getElementById('lightboxPrev').addEventListener('click', () => navLightbox(-1));
  document.getElementById('lightboxNext').addEventListener('click', () => navLightbox(1));
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target === lightbox) closeLightbox(); });
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (!lightbox.classList.contains('active')) return;
    if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox();
    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') navLightbox(-1);
    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') navLightbox(1);
  });

  /* Lightbox image transition */
  lightboxImg.style.transition = 'opacity 0.2s ease';

  /* ── Filmstrip interaction ── */
  const filmstripFrames = document.querySelectorAll('.filmstrip__frame');
  const galleryTrack = document.getElementById('galleryTrack');

  filmstripFrames.forEach(frame => {
    frame.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const idx = parseInt(frame.dataset.index);
      filmstripFrames.forEach(f => f.classList.remove('active'));
      frame.classList.add('active');
      const targetItem = galleryTrack.children[idx];
      if (targetItem) {
        targetItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'start', block: 'nearest' });
      }
    });
  });

  /* ── Before/After Slider ── */
  const sliderWrap = document.getElementById('compareSlider');
  const afterImg = sliderWrap.querySelector('.compare__img--after');
  const divider = document.getElementById('compareDivider');
  const handle = document.getElementById('compareHandle');
  let isDragging = false;

  function updateSlider(x) {
    const rect = sliderWrap.getBoundingClientRect();
    let pct = ((x - rect.left) / rect.width) * 100;
    pct = Math.max(2, Math.min(98, pct));
    afterImg.style.clipPath = `inset(0 ${100 - pct}% 0 0)`;
    divider.style.left = pct + '%';
    handle.style.left = pct + '%';
  }

  sliderWrap.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => { isDragging = true; updateSlider(e.clientX); });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { if (isDragging) updateSlider(e.clientX); });
  document.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { isDragging = false; });
  sliderWrap.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { isDragging = true; updateSlider(e.touches[0].clientX); }, { passive: true });
  document.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => { if (isDragging) updateSlider(e.touches[0].clientX); }, { passive: true });
  document.addEventListener('touchend', () => { isDragging = false; });

  /* ── Contact form handler ── */
  window.handleSubmit = function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = e.target.querySelector('.contact__btn');
    btn.textContent = 'Message Sent ✓';
    btn.style.background = 'var(--color-accent)';
    btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--color-accent)';
    btn.style.color = '#fff';
    setTimeout(() => {
      btn.textContent = 'Send Message';
      btn.style.background = '';
      btn.style.borderColor = '';
      btn.style.color = '';
      e.target.reset();
    }, 3000);
  };

  /* ── Smooth anchor offset ── */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
    a.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      const target = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });
})();
</script>
